name: supernono-codex
description: Forwards fine-grained Codex lifecycle events (tool use, permission requests) to the local SuperNoNo desktop pet via its unified signal protocol (POST 127.0.0.1:4174/signal). Uses official Codex plugin hooks; hooks are auto-discovered from ./hooks/hooks.json.

interface.shortDescription: Drive the SuperNoNo desktop pet from Codex lifecycle events
